message:
feat(ext4): parse quota inode superblock metadata (bd-vs8d1)

Extend Ext4Superblock decode to cover the quota-inode fields that the
upstream ext4 superblock layout carries alongside the MMP / backup_bgs
region: usr_quota_inum (0x240), grp_quota_inum (0x244), and
prj_quota_inum (0x26C). Previously these slots were skipped, which
left FrankenFS unable to surface the inode numbers that tools like
e2fsprogs and the kernel use to resolve the hidden quota trees when
the EXT4_FEATURE_RO_COMPAT_QUOTA flag is set.

Changes:
- ffs-ondisk/src/ext4.rs:
  - Add usr_quota_inum, grp_quota_inum, prj_quota_inum fields to
    Ext4Superblock between mmp_block and backup_bgs so on-disk ordering
    matches the ext4 layout.
  - Parse those fields in the parse() codepath using read_le_u32 at
    the spec-defined offsets.
  - Introduce Ext4QuotaInodes with user/group/project Option<u32>
    accessors plus a quota_inodes() helper that gates each slot on the
    QUOTA ro-compat feature and filters out zeroed inode numbers so
    callers cannot confuse "feature disabled" with "inode 0".
- ffs-ext4/src/lib.rs: add a re-export regression test
  (superblock_reexport_exposes_quota_inode_metadata) that builds a
  minimal valid superblock, asserts the raw fields round-trip, and
  validates the QUOTA-feature gating in quota_inodes().
- ffs-ext4/tests/online_resize.rs: initialize the three new fields on
  the fixture superblock so the online-resize tests keep compiling
  against the expanded struct.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md: extend the ext4 superblock-decode row to call out
  the newly decoded quota-inode metadata and feature-aware accessors.
- .beads/issues.jsonl: mark bd-vs8d1 in_progress, add bd-4d3xf (harden
  EXT4_IOC_MOVE_EXT donor validation parity) and bd-sqtrq (stress fuse
  inode lock ordering under concurrent requests) as follow-up beads
  discovered during the parity review.

No behavior change for non-QUOTA filesystems — the new fields decode
to zero and quota_inodes() short-circuits to None on each axis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@
 
 | Capability | Legacy Reference | Status | Notes |
 |------------|------------------|--------|-------|
-| ext4 superblock decode | `fs/ext4/ext4.h` | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-ext4`, including `s_mmp_*`, flex-group sizing, reserved GDT fields, and `s_backup_bgs` parsing |
+| ext4 superblock decode | `fs/ext4/ext4.h` | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-ext4`, including `s_mmp_*`, flex-group sizing, reserved GDT fields, `s_backup_bgs`, and quota-inode metadata parsing (`s_usr_quota_inum`, `s_grp_quota_inum`, `s_prj_quota_inum`) with feature-aware accessors |
 | ext4 inode core decode | `fs/ext4/ext4.h` | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-ext4` |
 | ext4 extent header decode | `fs/ext4/ext4_extents.h` | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-ext4` |
 | ext4 extent entry decode | `fs/ext4/ext4_extents.h` | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-ext4`, with `crates/ffs-harness/tests/kernel_reference.rs` now differentially comparing `collect_extents` against `debugfs blocks` on generated contiguous and deterministic two-extent reference files. |

@@ -57,6 +57,9 @@ fn make_online_resize_superblock() -> Ext4Superblock {
         log_groups_per_flex: 0,
         mmp_update_interval: 0,
         mmp_block: 0,
+        usr_quota_inum: 0,
+        grp_quota_inum: 0,
+        prj_quota_inum: 0,
         backup_bgs: [0; 2],
         checksum_type: 1,
         checksum_seed: 0,
